title: mcp-client-realwire protocol
description: Real-wire MCP client protocol identifier registered into adapter.protocol-or-transport per D29. Activates D48 §B.1 AdapterCallError forward-bar under real network / auth / timeout / protocol-error / upstream-error conditions per D68 §C closure item (e) + D71 §B.1. Wire format is MCP JSON-RPC via the official Anthropic mcp Python SDK (per D68 §B.3 verify-at-workstream-start discipline). 0.1.0 stub protocol identifier `mcp-server-ext:mcp-client` stands unchanged for back-compat per D41 two-substrate parity precedent.
